description: SmartWeb Mode v8.0.0 — Structural anti-laziness architecture: S1 GATE (3 objective checks to prevent trivial routing), COMPLETENESS CHECK (post-execution 3-question quality gate), trigger-based webfetch (precision, not ritual), LAZY THOUGHT DETECTOR (7 thoughts with corrections), S2 vague-bullet escalation, S3 evidence requirement, S4 delegation enforcement.
